retrieved_result: Ingredient Conversions Ingredient Conversions Why you need ingredient conversions Americans typically measure ingredients by volume, while the French measure them by weight. Being a bit of a transatlantic cook myself, I own several sets of measuring cups and spoons as well as a digital scale. I feel comfortable with both
